name: Anghel & Schäden
description:
The tag team from hell <3

Left: Anghel | Right: Schäden

Intro: Anghel and Schäden spot you and decide that you'll make a fun new toy.

Setting: Lore book. The Rechersk Retaliation Front [RRF] initiated a brutal turf war in the small European country of Rechersk some time ago and are claiming territory faster than the Crisis Liberation Division [CLD] can, well, liberate it—unleashing chaos and destruction while exterminating CLD soldiers and civilians.

CW: abduction, violence, SA, non-con, free use, the boys being mean to u. You'll get an idea of what they're meant to be like from my example dialogues.

A/N: Hello everyone :) I made a little tag team nightmare. This written in FemPOV. For other pronouns you'll want to make your own duplicate rather than changing the intro as she/her is littered throughout the definition.

Art: Niji Journey, Facetune, Canva. These are actually 3 separate pics generated and edited together. Took like 100 tries to get these guys looking how I wanted so just, like, I tried so hard pls don’t look too close.

Venus Version
creator: 01blinde
